creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

I'm aware of the new versions, and I've been keeping an eye on 
the stunnel mailing list for user reports.  Now it seems that 
with stunnel-4.33 just out, pretty much all the regressions have 
been resolved, so I'll try to update to 4.33 ASAP.
